evidence_status_recap.evidence_language_allowed: internal formal cross-check estimator result only

independent_validation_requirements.details: Run a distinct estimator family or externally audited formal evidence workflow, not just the current chain-local formal cross-check.
Predefine matched prior-volume alternatives for shared and DEU-only dimensions and report sensitivity of log-BF-style values.
Keep full-objective likelihood matching explicit and keep TT_lite exclusion visible unless a separate TT_lite-included branch is booked.
Confirm native sampler/evidence inputs reproduce the Stage 3B-15/16/18 lineage before independent evidence execution.
Confirm DEU sampler/evidence inputs reproduce the Stage 3B-9/10/11/27/28 lineage before independent evidence execution.
Write a final claim-lock stage that distinguishes internal evidence language from any external/publication wording.

preflight_manifest.bayes_factor_or_evidence_claims_scope: internal formal cross-check estimator result only
preflight_manifest.next_stage_hint: Stage 3B-30 independent evidence validation preflight or execution design
preflight_manifest.recommendation: Book Stage 3B-29. Internal formal-evidence language remains allowed with caveats; external/publication, model-superiority, and final claims require independent validation.
